title: McMMO Durability Viewer
description: This mod allows players on Servers with the McMMO Plugin to see Durability Bars and Available Max Consumes on the Item itself instead of only the tooltip.
body:
This mod allows players on Servers with the McMMO Plugin to see Durability Bars and Available Max Consumes on the Item itself instead of only the tooltip.

This mod is Client side.

With Mod menu Installed you can change the NBT Tag's and the color for the Consume Value to allow support for other Plugins/Modpacks.

### Special Thank's

To Jake (notIrma)
